title: Test-of-restraint mixed addressing; mention-addressed agent must SPEAK
failure_mode: no mention-target recognition; classifier cannot tell the addressed agent from bystanders and falls through on the concrete ask (FR-018)
invariant: the mention-addressed agent SPEAKs to a direct operator ask
rationale: The <@...> mention names the primary recipient (mapped to castor per the spec.md FR-018 edge-case retelling; envelope carries agent.mention_id so addressing is decidable). The parenthetical is operator meta-commentary, not the ask.
